        global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

        internal IMapper_TIn_TOut_MockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::Sandbox.IMapper<TIn, TOut>> engine)
        {
            _engine = engine;
        }

        public TOut Map(TIn input)
        {
            return _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<TOut, TIn>(0, "Map", input, default!);

        public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
        {
            throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
        }

    {
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
        internal static void Register()

            global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterOpenGenericFactory(
                typeof(global::Sandbox.IMapper<,>),
                typeof(IMapper_TIn_TOut_MockImpl<,>),
                typeof(IMapper_TIn_TOut_Mock<,>));

            engine.Raisable = impl;
